title: Evaluation Report v1
description: Schema for evaluation report (v1) - policy validity evaluation over dataset manifests

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of creation (injectable for determinism tests)

datasetDigest.description: SHA-256 hash copied from dataset manifest v2 (stable dataset identity)

assemblyConfigHash.description: SHA-256 hash copied from dataset manifest v2 (assembly configuration hash)

evalConfigHash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical JSON config (sorted keys, stable)

illegalMoveRate.description: Percentage of records where policy emits move not in legalMoves (fixed-decimal string for byte-stability, e.g., '0.0000')

top1.description: Percentage of records where policy's top-1 move is in legalMoves (fixed-decimal string)

top3.description: Percentage of records where policy's top-3 moves intersect legalMoves (fixed-decimal string)

mean.description: Mean Shannon entropy of policy distribution (fixed-decimal string, or 'N/A' if not applicable)

stddev.description: Standard deviation of policy entropy (fixed-decimal string, optional)

policyEntropy.description: Policy entropy statistics (Shannon entropy of probability distribution)

uniqueMovesEmitted.description: Number of unique moves emitted across dataset

splits.description: Per-split metric breakdown (only includes splits that were evaluated)

recordsEvaluated.description: Number of records evaluated in this split

illegalMoveRate.description: Percentage of records where policy emits move not in legalMoves (fixed-decimal string)

top1.description: Percentage of records where policy's top-1 move is in legalMoves (fixed-decimal string)

top3.description: Percentage of records where policy's top-3 moves intersect legalMoves (fixed-decimal string)

topKLegalCoverage.description: Top-K legal coverage metrics for this split

mean.description: Mean Shannon entropy of policy distribution (fixed-decimal string, or 'N/A' if not applicable)

stddev.description: Standard deviation of policy entropy (fixed-decimal string, optional)

policyEntropy.description: Policy entropy statistics for this split

uniqueMovesEmitted.description: Number of unique moves emitted in this split
